shortDescription: Modern luxury 3-bedroom condo in Brickell with stunning bay views and resort-style amenities.
fullDescription: This sleek high-rise condo in the heart of Brickell offers breathtaking views of Biscayne Bay. Features include floor-to-ceiling windows, an open-concept kitchen with Italian cabinetry, and a spacious primary suite. Building amenities include an infinity pool, spa, fitness center, and 24-hour concierge.
